summary: GH-97 implementation is approved for PR review. Scope is limited to the in-process Viewer/control facts slice in `packages/runtime-api`, Core runtime facts readback, App runtime status fixture, GH-97 item-specific carriers, and fact-chain pointer sync for #87/#97-#100.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-97 working tree passed `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, `pnpm smoke:runtime:local`, `git diff --check`, JSON readability, `loom verify`, `loom suite validate --item GH-97`, `loom suite carrier validate --item GH-97`, `loom suite evidence validate --item GH-97`, and `loom fact-chain`; `loom build` is blocked by installed CLI path consumption for repo-local `tools/loom.py`, while the required global suite/carrier/evidence surfaces passed separately.
follow_ups: Re-review if this PR changes public viewer/control fact shapes, handoff reason values, Core runtime facts payload, App fixture payload, Runtime Session lifecycle behavior, or PR head content beyond carrier-only review metadata.

This approval does not cover real viewer transport, hosted browser, public raw CDP/VNC/WebSocket endpoints, full remote console, account/secret custody, detailed handoff pause/lock state machine, task outcome/reconciliation, provider marketplace, or cross-repo Core/App changes.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation adds opaque viewer refs, unavailable/unsupported viewer state, minimal control owner and handoff facts, Core runtime facts readback, App status fixture, focused tests, and smoke coverage without exposing raw runtime endpoints or implementing out-of-scope viewer/handoff behavior.
